steps.summary: Test course for the eXeLearning SCORM plugin.

steps.name: Test Content
steps.intro: Sample eXeLearning SCORM content for testing.

steps.code:
<?php
define('CLI_SCRIPT', true);
require('/www/moodle/config.php');
require_once($CFG->dirroot . '/mod/exescorm/lib.php');
require_once($CFG->dirroot . '/mod/exescorm/locallib.php');

$course = $DB->get_record('course', ['shortname' => 'EXESCORM01'], '*', MUST_EXIST);
$modules = [
    'Test Content' => '/tmp/test-content.elpx',
    'Propiedades' => '/tmp/propiedades.elpx',
];

foreach ($modules as $modname => $filepath) {
    $exescorm = $DB->get_record('exescorm', ['course' => $course->id, 'name' => $modname]);
    if (!$exescorm || !file_exists($filepath)) continue;

    $cm = get_coursemodule_from_instance('exescorm', $exescorm->id, $course->id);
    $context = context_module::instance($cm->id);
    $fs = get_file_storage();

    $filename = basename($filepath);

    $fileinfo = [
        'contextid' => $context->id,
        'component' => 'mod_exescorm',
        'filearea' => 'package',
        'itemid' => 0,
        'filepath' => '/',
        'filename' => $filename,
        'userid' => 2,
        'source' => $filename,
        'author' => 'Admin User',
        'license' => 'unknown',
    ];

    $newpackage = $fs->create_file_from_pathname($fileinfo, $filepath);

    $exescorm->exescormtype = 'local';
    $exescorm->reference = $filename;
    $exescorm->sha1hash = $newpackage->get_contenthash();
    $exescorm->timemodified = time();
    $DB->update_record('exescorm', $exescorm);

    try {
        exescorm_parse($exescorm, true);
    } catch (Throwable $e) {}
}
echo json_encode(['ok' => true]);
